column1: # historical_results: autoresearch-results.tsv marked INVALID_LEAKAGE; do not compare or select from it

column8: description
clean v2 baseline after stripping stored computed_features, removing contaminated rank/rr features, canonical chulNo ordering, and re-running 10 seeds

feature_family_cleanup: removed direct stored-only `jk_skill` and `tr_skill` inputs to test whether dropping redundant/backfill-risk skill values while retaining safer place-rate context improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability

feature_family_addition: added T-30 RELEASE/current_model_input `weight_delta` to test whether prerace body-weight change adds release-safe condition signal beyond absolute `wgHr_value` and improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability

feature_family_addition: added T-30 RELEASE/current_model_input cancelled_changed_jockey context (`field_size_live`, `cancelled_count`) to test whether pre-cutoff live-field and cancellation signals add stability beyond raw `field_size`; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_cleanup: removed stored-only direct horse skill input `horse_top3_skill` to test whether dropping a redundant/backfill-risk skill value while retaining safer horse place-rate and start-count context improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

class_weighting: raised synchronized `positive_class_weight` from 1.00 to 1.05 to test whether a mild top-3 positive-class recall bias improves worst-seed holdout stability in the clean-v2 kept context with `jk_skill`/`tr_skill` removed and `weight_delta` added; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_cleanup: removed stored-only annual horse start-count input `horse_starts_y` to test whether dropping a redundant/backfill-risk career-volume signal while retaining safer horse place-rate context improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_addition: added operationally allowed stored-as-of `horse_win_rate` to test whether a win-only top-heavy horse strength signal adds stability beyond retained place-rate and `horse_top3_skill` context; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_addition: added same-race rating-relative core-card features (`rating_rank`, `rating_rr`) to test whether release-safe within-race rating normalization improves worst-seed stability beyond raw `rating`; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_addition: added T-30 release-safe `draw_rr` to test whether field-normalized draw position adds stability beyond raw `draw_no` across variable field sizes; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

model_family_switch: switched top-level `model.kind` and params from the kept HGB configuration to the schema-supported `rf_depth8_600trees` candidate to test whether bagging reduces seed-level variance and raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability in the clean-v2 context

rf_parameter_regularization: raised active RF `min_samples_leaf` from 8 to 12 to test whether stronger leaf regularization reduces seed variance and raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability after the RF model-family keep; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

rf_parameter_depth: raised active RF `max_depth` from 8 to 10 to test whether deeper trees capture additional prerace feature interactions while retaining leaf-size regularization after the RF model-family keep; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

rf_parameter_regularization: lowered active RF `min_samples_leaf` from 8 to 6 to test whether weaker leaf regularization recovers prerace feature interactions without increasing depth after the RF model-family keep; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

model_family_switch: switched top-level `model.kind` and params from the kept RF configuration to the schema-supported `et_depth8_800trees` candidate to test whether ExtraTrees bagging randomness raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability after RF parameter tweaks regressed; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

model_family_switch: switched top-level `model.kind` and params from the kept RF configuration to the schema-supported `logreg_balanced_c075` candidate to test whether a smoother balanced linear classifier reduces ensemble-specific seed variance and raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability after RF/ET parameter and family experiments plateaued

logreg_regularization: lowered active LogReg `C` from 0.75 to 0.50 to test whether stronger L2 regularization reduces overfit and raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability in the kept LogReg context; metric tied the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

logreg_convergence_budget: raised active LogReg `max_iter` from 2000 to 5000 to test whether giving the kept linear model more optimization budget resolves lbfgs under-convergence and improves leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

class_weighting: raised synchronized LogReg `positive_class_weight` from 1.00 to 1.10 in both model and common hyperparameters to test whether a stronger top-3 positive recall bias raises leakage-free worst-seed holdout stability in the kept LogReg context; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_cleanup: removed stored/backfill-risk horse-history proxy inputs (`horse_top3_skill`, `horse_starts_y`) to test whether the kept LogReg context was over-relying on stale horse-history signals while preserving T-30 operational compatibility; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted

feature_family_addition: added the high-coverage stored-as-of win-signal bundle (`horse_win_rate`, `jockey_win_rate`, `trainer_win_rate`, `jockey_recent_win_rate`) to test whether LogReg could use win-only strength/form signals beyond retained place-rate context after LogReg parameter and cleanup attempts regressed; metric regressed below the clean-v2 best and the experiment was reverted
